quotes.text: Defilers... I can smell the Nightmare in your blood. Be gone from these woods or suffer nature's wrath!
Defilers... so it is you who have befouled these woods with the Nightmare.
I sense a powerful druid among you. You dare to challenge my authority?
I will bleed the Nightmare from you!
I am nature's fury incarnate!
Be purified in the light of the stars!
The Nightmare will not take these sacred woods.
I see now... I am the defiler...
I will break you!
What is this? Don't make me laugh!
You wish to die? So be it!
None may challenge me and live!
Trespassers will be punished.
You will waste away slowly, painfully.
I will fracture your feeble mind!
Don't act surprised.
You never stood a chance.
Weak!
You deserve nothing less.
What other outcome could there be against a god?
The same fate awaits all who oppose Xavius!
You cannot... defeat a... god.
This must be some kind of... mistake...
No, no! I refuse to... accept...
